entries.title: Homily on Acts 53 on acts 27:2
entries.excerpt: See how far Aristarchus also accompanies Paul. To good and useful purpose is Aristarchus present, as he would take back the report of all to Macedonia.

entries.title: Commentary on Acts on acts 27:2
entries.excerpt: Aristarchus is profitably present and accompanies Paul, since he must report in Macedonia everything that happened to Paul.
